description: SRL-2018 memory image — Windows 10 compromised by APT deploying multiple backdoor processes (usbclient.exe, license_ctrl.e, ftusbsrvc.exe) with C2 to 172.16.4.10:8080

iocs.description: Fake USB service backdoor (PID 4916) listening on port 33001
Non-standard USB client (PID 6648) launched from explorer.exe
Fake license control service (PID 1716) listening on port 5682
C2 server — multiple closed connections confirmed
